name: unified_metaforge
description: Sophisticated autonomous meta-infrastructure for workflows. Includes Unified MetaForge v1.0 and StoryForge lineage with Three-Agent Core (KickForge, KickFlow, KickGuard), KickLang orchestration, persistent Meta-DNA, consent-based execution, coherence monitoring, and self-improving cognitive architecture.

tools.name: meta_report_tool
tools.description: Generate evolving Meta-Report Cards, track Meta-DNA evolution, audit coherence and hybrid scores, and optionally trigger downstream skills or forges.

tools.name: spawn_forge
tools.description: Spawn a new domain-specific or universal forge using the full Unified MetaForge engine.

tools.name: trigger_skill
tools.description: Explicitly trigger another skill or internal forge with Meta-DNA context.

metadata.lineage: WorkflowForge v1.0 + StoryForge v5.0 → Unified MetaForge v1.0
